case_title: 1745 MARKET ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. CARLOS MURCIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 1745 MARKET ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MURCIA, CARLOS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1751 MARKET STREET, APT. 35 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75191539)
